description_long: This house features a striking modern architectural design with a flat roof and a combination of black and white exterior surfaces. The front facade is dominated by large floor-to-ceiling windows, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless connection between the interior and the landscaped front yard. The structure is composed of clean, geometric lines and boxy volumes, with a mix of opaque and transparent surfaces. The landscaping includes a manicured lawn, shrubs, and several mature trees, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The rear and side elevations are more private, with fewer windows and a focus on solid wall surfaces. The overall impression is one of sophistication, minimalism, and integration with the surrounding urban environment.
description: A modern, boxy house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a mix of black and white exterior surfaces, set within a landscaped yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows, a landscaped yard, and the main entryway with a small tree and pathway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white wall, minimal window openings, and trees flanking the property.
description_view_2: Rear view with mostly solid white surfaces, limited window exposure, and trees on either side.
description_view_3: Back view emphasizing the black exterior volume, flat roof, and a glimpse of the landscaped front area.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flush door, no porch, and a direct path through landscaped greenery
